title: Brand Strategy & Development Manager - TMT
description:
• Lead corporate brand strategy and positioning
  • Run high-impact brand campaigns and content

About Our Client

Our client is a leading, well-established organisation with a strong market presence and a high-profile corporate brand. Operating in a fast-evolving and highly competitive environment, the organisation places a strong emphasis on strategic branding, corporate storytelling and reputation management to support long-term business growth.

Job Description

  • Develop and implement corporate brand strategy, positioning and architecture across the organisation
  • Ensure consistent application of brand guidelines across all communication channels and business units
  • Lead the planning and execution of integrated brand campaigns and corporate storytelling initiatives
  • Oversee development of digital and social content for brand-led communications
  • Manage brand tool kits, templates and assets, ensuring relevance and quality
  • Partner with business units and agencies to develop and roll out campaign and communication materials
  • Identify, negotiate and manage sponsorships and partnerships to enhance brand visibility and alignment
  • Lead industry award submissions and related announcements to strengthen corporate reputation
  • Manage external vendors and agencies, including procurement, budgets and approvals

The Successful Applicant

A successful Brand Development Manager should have:

  • 5-8 years' experience in corporate branding, corporate communications or related roles, ideally within a large, complex or publicly listed organisation
  • Strong understanding of corporate brand strategy, campaign management and digital content
  • Proven experience working with multiple stakeholders and managing agency partners
  • Excellent writing and editing skills, with the ability to craft clear, compelling brand narratives
  • Highly organised, proactive and detail-oriented, with strong project management capability
  • Commercially minded with the ability to balance strategic thinking and hands-on execution
  • Confident communicator with strong interpersonal and relationship management skills

What's on Offer

  • A high-visibility corporate brand role within a well-established, market-leading organisation
  • Opportunity to shape and elevate a major corporate brand across multiple platforms and touch points
  • Broad remit covering brand strategy, campaigns, digital content, partnerships and awards
  • Exposure to senior stakeholders and cross-functional teams within a complex organisation
  • Stable environment with strong brand equity and long-term career development opportunities
